title: Plug and Allied Green Execute Binding Framework Agreement for 3 GW Electrolyzer Capacity
content: Plug Power Incorporation, a global leader in comprehensive hydrogen solutions for the green hydrogen economy, has signed a binding framework agreement with Allied Green Ammonia (AGA), an Australian company focused on green ammonia production, to finalize a supply agreement for three gigawatts (GW) of electrolyzer capacity to AGAâ€™s green hydrogen to ammonia plant in Australia.
author: Analysts Account
